# Neo-M3 Hybrid (Wired/Verge)

Neo-M3 Hybrid combines editorial high-contrast aesthetics with Material You structure.

## Core Features
- Strong outlines (`border-2` to `border-4`, typically black)
- Hard drop shadows (`shadow-[6px_6px_0_0_#000]` pattern)
- Rounded geometry (`rounded-xl` to `rounded-3xl`) for modern tone
- Tonal accent fills balanced with neutral surfaces

## Component Patterns
- Cards: outlined containers with hard shadows and clear content hierarchy
- Buttons: thick border, strong hover inversion, and tactile pressed states
- Badges/Chips: bold labels with high readability and strong affordances

## Interaction
- Use clear state deltas (default, hover, active, disabled)
- Avoid excessive animation; use snappy transitions
- Preserve accessibility by maintaining contrast and obvious focus indication
